ceo_message.name: Emmanuel HAKUZIMANA, RND & RN
ceo_message.message: At Vitaway Health, we believe the Healthcare should be proactive, connected, and deeply personal. Our mission is to shift the paradigm of the healthcare from reactive treatment to proactive prevention. By seamlessly combining cutting-edge technology, AIpowered solutions, nutritional science, and dedicated wellness support, we empower individuals and communities to live healthier, more vibrant lives. We are deeply committed to building accessible, scalable healthcare systems that give people the tools to prevent disease, make informed decisions, and achieve long-term well-being. Through innovation and community-centered care, we are proud to shape a healthier, preventive future for Rwanda and beyond. I am incredibly passionate about building sustainable healthcare infrastructure across Africa. We are actively open to strategic partnerships with employers, insurers, healthcare providers, and investors who share this vision of a healthier tomorrow

advisory_boad.name: Jean Claude Mugunga
advisory_boad.description: Physician leader focused on using data, research, and innovative financing to strengthen equitable health systems and Physician leader focused on data, research, and innovative financing to strengthen equitable health systems and advance Universal Health Coverage. Experienced in health strategy, policy advocacy, and data-driven decision-making, with a passion for mentoring future global health leaders.
advisory_boad.bio: As a Registered Nutritionist and Nursing Professional, I am passionate about transforming healthcare through AI-driven solutions. Growing up in Rwanda, I saw the impact of non-communicable diseases (NCDs) and the need for accessible, preventive care. That’s why I founded Vitaway Health to bridge the gap between patients and providers with personalized, sustainable health solutions. I meet people where they are, guiding them toward lasting change, one habit at a time. At Vitaway, better health isn’t just a goal, it’s a way of life.

clinical_members.name: Ally NIYONKURU
clinical_members.description: Dedicated to advancing individual wellness through quality healthcare, compassionate support, and personalized care. Passionate about helping people achieve healthier, balanced lives through professional medical services, ethical practice, preventive wellness, and patient-centered solutions that promote physical, mental, and lifestyle well-being across every stage of life.

coaching_team.name: Joseph Karemera
coaching_team.description: Registered Nurse and Clinical Dietitian Nutritionist with expertise in public health, epidemiology, and data analysis. Passionate about promoting preventive healthcare, nutrition education, and evidence-based wellness solutions.
coaching_team.bio: Joseph Karemera has been working in Rwanda health care system for more than five years, his experience range from clinical, public health, and Research. He is clinical Nutritionist and Dietician by training. His career focuses in Non-communicable disease prevention, management and control and Research. Using he is gained knowledge and skills in Nutrition and dietetic together with his master’s degree in Public health and disease control, he is mission aims to establish at which level the primary non-communicable diseases risk factors lead to secondary risk factors such as elevated blood pressure and sugar…etc. and its reverse using medical nutrition therapy in Africa Population.

coaching_team.name: Emmanuel Murindwa
coaching_team.description: Nutrition coach dedicated to helping individuals improve their health through personalized nutrition guidance, lifestyle support, and sustainable wellness habits. Passionate about promoting healthier living through practical and client-centered coaching.
coaching_team.bio: Emmanuel specializes in creating personalized meal plans for individuals with Non-Communicable Diseases (NCDs) and provides nutrition counseling across various life stages. He has worked as a Social Behavior Change Officer at Three Stones International and he is also actively involved in volunteering with organizations like the Rwanda NCD Alliance and Health Alert Organization, focusing on NCD prevention and public health advocacy.
